input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The README's common YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON examples require optional hoplite-* parser modules; generated tests should avoid those formats unless they intentionally add the matching parser dependency.
Hoplite 3.0 changes environment-variable property-source behavior, so tests that exercise environment overrides must set their own values deterministically in test code.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No setup beyond the normal scaffold is required: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves only Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines dependencies, includes its core decoders and built-in .props/.properties parser via ServiceLoader, and can be meaningfully exercised with MapPropertySource or properties resources without external services, Docker, or fixed environment values.
